title: CWC Public Notice 01/2011 Regarding Appointment of officers as National Authority
description: CWC Public Notice 01/2011 Regarding Appointment of officers as National Authority
text: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS (DEPARTMENT OF CHEMICALS AND PETROCHEMICALS) PUBLIC NOTICE NO. 01/2011 F. No.40020/22/2006-Ch.l New Delhi, t h e ^ . £ December, 2011 The Central Government, exercising the powers conferred by sub-section(l) of section 9 read with sub-section (2) of section 6 of the Chemical Weapons Convention Act, 2000 (34 of 2000), through the issuance of Notification No. S.O. 1491(E) dated 13.9.2006, has appointed the following officers as the officers of the National Authority, Chemical Weapons Convention and entrusted the said officers with the powers and functions of Enforcement Officers for the purpose of the said Act, namely: (a) Officers of Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence of the level of Intelligence Officer and above. (b) Officers of the level of Deputy Director and above in the National Authority, Chemical Weapons Convention. (c) Officers of the rank of Assistant Industrial Advisor and above in the Department of Chemicals and Petrochemicals. 2. For the purpose of certificate of appointment for the above mentioned officers as required under sub-section (3) of section 9 of Chemical Weapons Convention Act, 2000 (34 of 2000), it is hereby, ordered that the individual identity cards issued to the above levels of notified officers as mentioned in para 1 above by their respective controlling authorities/ Departments will be treated as the said certificate of appointment issued under sub-section (3) of section 9 of the said Act for enabling them to discharge the responsibility of Enforcement Officers. (Dr. A . J V Prasad) Joint Secretary To 1. Secretary, Department of Chemicals and Petrochemicals 2. Chairman, National Authority, Chemical Weapons Convention -- 1 of 2 -- 3. Directorate General, Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence 4. All industry associations viz. FICCI, Cll, ICC, DMAI, AMAI, Crop Care, Crop Life, PFMAI, IDMA, OPPI, FAI 5. All the declarants plant sites 6. DDG (Statistics) for publicity on the web-site of DCPC 7. National Informatics Centre -- 2 of 2 --
